# Task: Create a Question Paper in Hindi for Exam Preparation

## Objective
Generate a simple HTML document containing questions related to Given Topic in Hindi for exam preparation.

## Requirements
1. Create clean, printer-friendly HTML that can be easily converted to PDF from a browser
3. Each question should have 4 options (A, B, C, D)
4. Questions should cover various concepts: basic calculations, word problems, application-based questions, scenarios, should include tricky calculations and real-life applications.
5. Content must be in Hindi with proper formatting
6. Include a detailed step-by-step solution for each question at the end

## Output Format
- Title and instructions at the top
- Numbered questions (1-30) with clear options
- Solutions section at the end with comprehensive explanations
- Simple HTML structure with minimal styling for clean printing

## Additional Notes
- Ensure mathematical formulas are correctly displayed
- Include varied difficulty levels with emphasis on tricky calculations
- Cover all possible question types that appear in exams
